term.en: Medicare Advantage vs. Original Medicare + Medigap + Part D
term.es: Medicare Advantage vs. Medicare Original + Medigap + Parte D

definition.en: Medicare Advantage (Part C) bundles hospital, medical, and usually drug coverage into one private plan with a 2026 statutory out-of-pocket maximum of $9,250, while Original Medicare (Parts A and B) paired with a Medigap supplement and a standalone Part D drug plan offers broader provider access and more predictable costs at a higher monthly premium.
definition.es: Medicare Advantage (Parte C) combina cobertura hospitalaria, medica y generalmente de medicamentos en un plan privado con un maximo de gastos de bolsillo estatutario de $9,250 en 2026, mientras que Medicare Original (Partes A y B) combinado con un suplemento Medigap y un plan de medicamentos Parte D independiente ofrece acceso mas amplio a proveedores y costos mas predecibles con una prima mensual mas alta.

topic: Medicare Advantage vs Original Medicare + Medigap + Part D: 2026 Decision

title.en: Medicare Advantage vs. Original Medicare + Medigap 2026
title.es: Medicare Advantage vs. Medicare Original + Medigap 2026

description.en: Compare Medicare Advantage (Part C) vs. Original Medicare + Medigap + Part D for 2026. Key costs, provider access, and which plan fits your situation.
description.es: Compare Medicare Advantage (Parte C) vs. Medicare Original + Medigap + Parte D en 2026. Costos, acceso a proveedores y que plan se adapta a su situacion.

h1.en: Medicare Advantage vs. Original Medicare + Medigap: Which Is Right for You in 2026?
h1.es: Medicare Advantage vs. Medicare Original + Medigap: Cual es la mejor opcion en 2026?

subhero.en: In 2026, Medicare Advantage caps out-of-pocket costs at $9,250 and often carries a $0 additional premium, while Original Medicare + Medigap Plan G averages roughly $215/month in supplement premiums but leaves you with near-unlimited provider choice and no network restrictions.
subhero.es: En 2026, Medicare Advantage limita los gastos de bolsillo a $9,250 y frecuentemente no cobra prima adicional, mientras que Medicare Original + Medigap Plan G promedia cerca de $215/mes en primas de suplemento pero ofrece libre eleccion de proveedores sin restricciones de red.

quickDefinition.en: Medicare Advantage (Part C) replaces Original Medicare through a private insurer and usually adds dental, vision, and drug coverage. The 2026 statutory MOOP cap is $9,250; the average in-network maximum is $6,073. Original Medicare covers any Medicare-accepting provider but has no built-in annual cost cap, so most people add Medigap and a [standalone Part D plan](/medicare-eligibility). Confirm your [Medicare eligibility](/medicare-eligibility) before enrolling.
quickDefinition.es: Medicare Advantage (Parte C) reemplaza Medicare Original a traves de un asegurador privado y generalmente agrega cobertura dental, visual y de medicamentos. Para 2026, el limite estatutario de gastos de bolsillo es $9,250 y el promedio en red es $6,073. Medicare Original permanece con el gobierno federal y cubre a cualquier proveedor que acepte Medicare, pero no tiene un limite anual integrado, por lo que la mayoria agrega una poliza Medigap y un plan de [Parte D](/medicare-eligibility) por separado para cubrir las brechas.

heading.en: Medicare Advantage vs. Original Medicare + Medigap: 2026 Side-by-Side
heading.es: Medicare Advantage vs. Medicare Original + Medigap: Comparacion 2026

paragraphs.en: The core tradeoff: Medicare Advantage offers lower monthly outlay but restricts you to a network and may require referrals in HMO-style plans. Original Medicare + Medigap costs more monthly but covers any Medicare-accepting provider with no referrals. [CMS](https://www.cms.gov/newsroom/fact-sheets/2026-medicare-advantage-part-d-rate-announcement) reports more than 34 million people enrolled in Medicare Advantage (54% of all Medicare beneficiaries). Approaching 65 on marketplace coverage? Review [ACA income limits](/aca-income-limits) before your Medicare start date.
paragraphs.es: La ventaja principal: Medicare Advantage ofrece menor desembolso mensual pero restringe a una red y requiere referencias en planes tipo HMO. Medicare Original con Medigap cuesta mas mensualmente pero cubre a cualquier proveedor que acepte Medicare en todo el pais sin referencias. Segun CMS, mas de 35 millones de personas estan inscritas en Medicare Advantage en 2026, aproximadamente el 54% de todos los beneficiarios de Medicare.

footnote.en: Sources: CMS 2026 MA rate announcement (cms.gov); KFF 2026 MA spotlight (kff.org). Part B premium $202.90/mo in 2026 per [medicare.gov](https://www.medicare.gov/basics/costs/medicare-costs/part-b-costs).
footnote.es: Fuentes: Anuncio de tarifas MA 2026 de CMS (cms.gov); Informe KFF 2026 sobre MA (kff.org). Prima Parte B: $202.90/mes en 2026 (medicare.gov).

en.question: What is the 2026 out-of-pocket maximum for Medicare Advantage?
en.answer: The 2026 statutory cap is $9,250 for in-network services; the average plan lands at $6,073, per [KFF](https://www.kff.org/medicare/medicare-advantage-2026-spotlight-a-first-look-at-plan-premiums-and-benefits/). After you hit the cap, the plan pays 100% of covered in-network costs.

en.question: Can I switch from Medicare Advantage back to Original Medicare?
en.answer: Yes. The Medicare Advantage Open Enrollment Period runs January 1 to March 31 each year. MA enrollees can switch plans or return to Original Medicare. Returning switchers may face medical underwriting for Medigap in most states. See [medicare.gov](https://www.medicare.gov) for details.

en.question: Does Medigap cover prescriptions in 2026?
en.answer: No. Medigap plans sold after 2006 do not include drug coverage. You need a standalone Part D plan; the 2026 Part D out-of-pocket cap is $2,100. Use the [medical bill analyzer](/medical-bill-analyzer) to estimate drug costs before enrolling.

es.question: Cual es el maximo de gastos de bolsillo de Medicare Advantage en 2026?
es.answer: El limite estatutario para 2026 es $9,250 para servicios en red. El promedio entre los planes es $6,073 en red por ano, segun KFF. Una vez que alcanza el limite, el plan cubre el 100% de los costos en red por el resto del ano.

es.question: Puedo cambiar de Medicare Advantage a Medicare Original?
es.answer: Si. El Periodo de Inscripcion Abierta de Medicare Advantage va del 1 de enero al 31 de marzo de cada ano, permitiendo a los inscritos en MA cambiar a un plan diferente o regresar a Medicare Original. Si regresa a Medicare Original, puede enfrentar suscripcion medica al solicitar Medigap en la mayoria de los estados. Consulte medicare.gov para las reglas de desinscripcion.

es.question: Medigap cubre medicamentos en 2026?
es.answer: No. Los planes Medigap vendidos despues del 1 de enero de 2006 no incluyen cobertura de medicamentos. Si elige Medicare Original mas Medigap, debe inscribirse en un plan Parte D independiente para medicamentos. El limite anual de gastos de bolsillo de la Parte D en 2026 es $2,100.
